duration.reasoning: 3.3s is driven by the title card pair ("Flaky Pie Crust / the kitchn" + "Creamy Pumpkin Soup") needing read time over the opener — not action duration — and the 50% speed ramp stretches the macro glide to fill that title hold without the shot feeling frozen.

in_point.reasoning: 13.8s catches the mitts mid-lower with the crust already revealed on the tray, giving motion into frame (tray descending) rather than a static crust or the busier oven-extraction moment just before.
